title: vivo X500 Pro Max's camera details leaked
description: More details about the rumored vivo X500 Pro Max have surfaced online. Just a day after a tipster revealed the display details of the device, the same source has now shared information regarding its rear camera system. According to the new leak, the Pro Max variant will feature a triple rear camera setup consisting of two 50MP sensors and a 200MP camera. vivo X300 Pro The primary camera is said to use Sony's 50MP 1/1.28-inch LOFIC sensor, while the periscope telephoto camera could be equipped with a 200MP 1/1.4-inch sensor. Meanwhile, vivo is also said to be testing an upgraded...

title: Noble Mobile buys Helium Mobile, will continue to operate its "people-powered" network
description: Today Helium Mobile has announced that it's being acquired by Noble Mobile. Helium Mobile launched back in 2023 with a hybrid network. It relied on T-Mobile just like any other MVNO, but it also had its own decentralized "people-powered" network comprising over 100,000 user-operated mini cell towers deployed across the US. It also made waves with its free Zero Plan, launched last year and discontinued a few weeks ago. There was a lot of talk of crypto rewards too because crypto was still the thing in 2023 apparently (before it gave way to AI as the new buzzword). Now, though, Helium Mobile...

title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra moniker confirmed by Bluetooth SIG
description: Samsung is rumored to launch two book-style folding smartphones this year - the Galaxy Z Fold8 and the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra. The Fold8 was previously called Fold8 Wide, while the Fold8 Ultra was called the Fold8. The renaming happened last month, causing confusion. While there's no word from Samsung on this development, we now know that the Fold8 Ultra moniker is real. This confirmation comes from the Bluetooth SIG, which has listed the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra in its database after certifying the foldable. While the database doesn't divulge any specs of the Fold8 Ultra, it has...

title: vivo X500 Pro Max display details leak
description: Back in April we first heard that vivo's upcoming X500 family would also include the X500 Pro Max, with the brand seemingly following in Xiaomi's footsteps, which of course was itself inspired by Apple's long-running smartphone naming scheme. Today Digital Chat Station on Weibo has shared some details about the vivo X500 Pro Max's screen. According to him, it will be a 6.85-inch flat LIPO OLED panel with "2.5D" glass on top, "2K" resolution, and a 144Hz refresh rate. vivo X300 Pro The panel will also support high-frequency PWM dimming across the entire brightness range. The screen...

title: Oppo and vivo are both making DJI Osmo Pocket 4 competitors, camera info leaks
description: Back in February we first heard that vivo was working on its very own vlogging camera to rival DJI's Osmo Pocket line, and now a new rumor from China claims Oppo is doing the same too. According to Digital Chat Station on Weibo, both the Oppo and the vivo devices will feature a 200MP camera using a 1/1.12" type sensor. That size is very specific and points towards Sony's Lytia 901, unveiled last November. DJI Osmo Pocket 4 Oppo may co-brand its vlogging camera with Hasselblad, and vivo with Zeiss. Both of these will have "flagship-level" chips that aren't mentioned, and they will...

title: Xiaomi 18 display and battery details leak
description: The Xiaomi 18 is coming in September, rumor has it, and according to a new leak from China, it will boast a 6.4-inch flat screen. That's marginally bigger than its predecessor's 6.3" panel, and it will keep the same 19.5:9 aspect ratio. The Xiaomi 18's panel will allegedly have "2K" resolution, which is an improvement over the Xiaomi 17, as well as ultra-narrow bezels, and large rounded corners. The phone's battery capacity will start with the number 7, and one commenter on Weibo seems to think it will be 7,800 mAh. Xiaomi 17 Anyway, even if it's "just" 7,000 mAh, that's still...

title: Apple's first Developer Center in Europe will open its doors in Berlin later this year
description: Apple is looking to improve its relationship with and help out app developers in Europe as it announces plans to open its first Apple Developer Center on the continent. It will be located in the Mitte district of Berlin, Germany, and will open its doors later this year. Apple already has Developer Centers in Bengaluru, Cupertino, Shanghai and Singapore. The center will be a place where developers can attend workshops where they will learn more about the wide variety of Apple platforms: phones with iOS, tablets with iPadOS, desktops with macOS, smartwatches with watchOS, streaming devices...

title: Acer unveils three new Iconia Duo tablets excelling in creativity and productivity
description: It's a fairly busy Computex 2026 for Acer this year. Among other devices, Acer also announced three new Iconia Duo tablets running on Android, designed for professionals looking for creativity and productivity devices on the go. Acer Iconia Duo S14 The Iconia Duo S14 is the top-of-the-line tablet with 14.2-inch OLED screen and 2,880 x 1,840px resolution. Yes, that means the aspect ratio is 3:2 making it ideal for productivity. A MediaTek Dimensity 8300 chipset sits behind the wheel paired with 8GB of RAM and up to 256GB internal storage. The latter is expandable via a microSD card up...

title: New leak tells a different story about the OnePlus 16's cameras
description: The OnePlus 16 has so far been rumored to sport a 50MP main camera and a 200MP periscope telephoto camera with 3x optical zoom, but today a new rumor from prolific Chinese leaker Digital Chat Station switches things around. According to him, the OnePlus 16 actually has a 200MP main camera and a 50MP periscope telephoto camera, along with a 50MP ultrawide. Obviously, we can't tell what's accurate from all these contradictory leaks. OnePlus 15 It might be that OnePlus is still testing different configurations on different prototypes and all of these are leaking while the company...

title: Leak: a Microsoft Surface Pro 13" with a Snapdragon X2 Elite is coming soon
description: A couple of weeks ago, Microsoft officially unveiled the Surface Laptop 8 (13.8” and 15”) and the Surface Pro. These are powered by Intel Core Ultra Series 3 chips. Microsoft has now shifted its attention to Windows on ARM with the Surface Laptop Ultra, which is powered by the mighty Nvidia RTX Spark chipset. However, the company also has Snapdragon-based devices in the pipeline, according to a new leak. The Microsoft Surface Pro 13” will feature the Snapdragon X2 Elite – one of the variants with 12 Prime “Oryon” cores. The chipset will be paired with 32GB of RAM (soldered) and a PCIe 4.0...

title: You can now make your own Fitbit Air bands
description: Google’s recently announced $99 Fitbit Air fitness tracker is already on open sale, and it just got a neat addition for DIY fans. Google released the official Fitbit Air design guidelines featuring the tracker’s exact dimensions, tolerance margins and 2D CAD files (PDF), so you can 3D print custom bands and accessories. The guidelines come with exact mating dimensions, tolerances and specifications for attach and detach force. Fitbit Air is comprised of two key components, with the “pebble” housing the sensors, batteries and key components, as well as the “sleeve,” which wraps around...

title: Microsoft unveils the Surface RTX Spark Dev Box: a desktop RTX Spark-powered computer
description: Microsoft unveiled the Surface Laptop Ultra, a MacBook Pro competitor powered by the Nvidia RTX Spark. What if you could have that but minus the laptop? Meet the Surface RTX Spark Dev Box. The pitch is short but sweet: 1 petaflop of compute, 128GB of RAM, can run 120 billion parameter models locally. To add a bit more detail, that is 1 petaflop of FP4 with sparse matrices and the RAM is unified so it is shared between the CPU and the GPU. Speaking of which, the RTX Spark combines a 20 core Grace CPU (10x Cortex-X925 + 10x Cortex-A725) and a Blackwell GPU, which is the architecture...

title: Here's when the Xiaomi 18 series, vivo X500 family, and Oppo Find X10 devices are rumored to launch
description: Last year, Xiaomi launched the 17, 17 Pro, and 17 Pro Max in September, while vivo and Oppo came out with the X300, X300 Pro, Find X9, and Find X9 Pro in October. According to a new rumor from China, Xiaomi will launch the 18 series this September, which is hardly surprising. However, the source claims that vivo and Oppo are also aiming to unveil the X500 series and Find X10 series, respectively, in September too. Xiaomi 17 Pro Max That would allow them to better compete with Xiaomi from the beginning. Xiaomi will likely still have a short exclusivity window for using Qualcomm's...

title: Samsung Galaxy M55s, F16, F17, F55, and F56 also receive One UI 8.5 stable update
description: Samsung released the One UI 8.5 stable update for the Galaxy M55 last week, and now it's the Galaxy M55s that's getting upgraded to stable One UI 8.5. [#InlinePriceWidget,13354,1#] The One UI 8.5 stable update for the Galaxy M55s comes with firmware version M558BXXU3DZE3, and India is among the first countries to receive it. Samsung Galaxy M55s In addition to the Galaxy M55s, Samsung also released the One UI 8.5 stable update for the Galaxy F16, Galaxy F17, Galaxy F55, and Galaxy F56. All smartphones are receiving the update in India, but the rollout should expand to other...

title: Get a REDMAGIC 11S Pro a day early with the early bird campaign
description: The new REDMAGIC 11S Pro is equipped with the latest technological developments from a company that has made it its mission to build phones that not only deliver top-of-the-line performance but can actually sustain that performance for hours-long gaming sessions. And you can pick one up a day earlier than most people. REDMAGIC is running its usual early bird promotional campaign – starting today, you can grab a voucher that will let you purchase the phone on June 9, 24 hours before the start of global open sales on June 10 (there is a detailed timeline at the bottom). You can get the...

title: Lava Bold N2 5G is here with a 6.75-inch screen and a 6,000mAh battery
description: After unveiling the Lava Bold N2 4G in India back in February, the Indian brand has now announced the 5G variant of the handset. The Bold N2 5G comes with a bigger battery and the Unisoc T8200 chipset. It sports a 6.75-inch LCD display that offers an HD+ resolution and a refresh rate of 120Hz. The screen features a waterdrop notch, which houses a 5MP front facing camera. The Lava Bold N2 5G is powered by the 6nm octa-core Unisoc T8200 SoC, which is paired with the Mali-G57 MC2 GPU. It is available with 4GB LPDDR4x RAM and 64GB UFS 2.2 storage. Lava is offering a 6,000mAh battery...

title: Google launches fake call detection in its Phone app
description: Google today announced fake call detection for the Phone by Google app. This protects you from what the company refers to as "the growing threat of impersonation scams", which are now using AI deepfakes. Here's how these scams work. First, the scammers spoof the originating phone number of, say, one of your family members, "routing calls through internet-based software to make it appear as though the call is originating from a familiar contact", Google says. Then they use "easily accessible" AI deepfake technology to sound exactly like "an authority figure, family member, or...

title: Realme P4R's key specs, design, price range, and launch date revealed
description: Realme has announced it will unveil the Realme P4R in India on June 10 at 12 PM local time. The Realme P4R will be powered by the Dimensity 6300 SoC, run Realme UI 7.0 out of the box, and offer up to 256GB of storage. The smartphone will feature a 144Hz display with 1,200 nits peak brightness, and fueling the entire package will be an 8,000 mAh battery, advertised to deliver three days of endurance on a single charge. The Realme P4R will support 45W wired charging, 27W reverse wired charging, and all-scenario bypass charging. Realme is advertising a "One Tap Cooling" feature that would...

title: Honor X7e silently launched with a 7,500mAh battery
description: Honor has silently introduced a new budget 4G smartphone in select global markets. The phone’s called the Honor X7e and its key selling point is the large 7,500mAh battery. The Honor X7e is powered by the MediaTek Helio G81 Ultra chipset and runs Android 16-based MagicOS 10.0. As mentioned in the beginning, the highlight of the phone is its large 7,500mAh battery, which supports 45W wired charging. In some regions, the handset will come with a 7,000mAh battery. The device sports a 6.6-inch LCD display up front with an HD+ resolution and a refresh rate of up to...

title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra said to pack a bigger battery at the same weight as Fold7
description: After revealing new details about Samsung's upcoming wide-screen Galaxy Z Fold8, tipster Ice Universe has now shared fresh information about the successor to the Galaxy Z Fold7, which is widely rumored to launch as the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra. The tipster claims that the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra will maintain the same 215-gram weight as the Galaxy Z Fold7. However, the upcoming foldable is tipped to pack a larger 5,000mAh battery. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra leaked render Notably, Samsung offered a 4,400mAh battery on the Z Fold7. According to the tipster, the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra will...
